scope: Sentinel values, claim-to-evidence anchoring, no fabricated citations
Named cognitive biases and concrete counter-moves
Stay anchored to the charter; document hierarchy; size hygiene
Reason expensively, execute cheaply; cascade-first; narrow reads
Match verification rigor to stakes; gate the heavy adversarial harness
Direct, concrete, scannable, honest, present tense, US English
Numbers are claims — compute by code/tool, never in your head
Data stays local; nothing identifiable leaves unless you ask
Raw immutable; verify join cardinality; explicit types; range checks
Validate raw + analysis-ready data at the gates; block on failure
Copy light / connect heavy data; portable config; minimal human docs
Define estimand/outcome before seeing results; flag post-hoc
Structured IDA before modeling (STRATOS); distinct from EDA
STRATOS longitudinal IDA (5 domains) + repeated-measures analysis
Don't ignore dependence; pick by estimand (GLS/GEE vs mixed); serial-first
Match methods+reporting to the TASK (SAMBR/CHAMP); general + by-task
No dichotomizing; splines for non-linearity; no stepwise; sparse-data/separation → penalize
Matters by goal, not in the abstract; never delete a confounder for VIF; VIF is a flag
Account for every row; mechanism-aware handling; no silent deletion
Detect→inspect→document; never silent removal; sensitivity
Graphics over tests; right residual per model; a violation ≠ invalid
Pre-specify; reuse the pipeline; report alongside the primary
Seeds via targets; renv.lock committed; locale/TZ; sessioninfo; stamp
Only input+code to git; everything regenerates; `make reset`
Vectorize; data.table/DuckDB by size; cache/freeze long runs
Labels-first; always CIs; no p in comparison tables (STROBE); rounding
Objective; every number & data-dependent word via inline code
Colorblind-safe palettes; grayscale test; vector + ≥300 dpi; journal sizes
flowchart (sketch-first) for results; mermaid + ISO 5807 for process
Write methods continuously; LaTeX notation registry; supplement
Pseudocode in its own file → validate → code → test
Abstract only when scaling; demo without→with; STOP-and-confirm gate
Tutorial-readable analysis code; comment the why; tests apart
Pick the EQUATOR guideline by design/task; fill its checklist
RECORD: data-source table, code lists, selection-from-DB flow
Codes are versioned inputs: provenance, one grouping, crosswalk loss, no archived `icd`
Comprehension gate (explain-back + examples + ASCII) before code; validate (PPV)
EHR vs claims observability; denominator-before-numerator; windows/episodes; immortal-time
Table 1/2 with gtsummary; no p in comparisons; SMD; missingness
